ObjectName.value: 2005 Monaco GP2, Monaco Grand Prix Support Race, Monte Carlo, 21st May

Categories.value: 2005 Monaco Grand Prix|Files with coordinates missing SDC location of creation|Flickr images reviewed by FlickreviewR 2|Sections of the Circuit de Monaco

ImageDescription.value:
Taken from Sectuer Rocher overlooking the start/finish straight, the pits and the harbour section of the circuit. The GP2 cars prepare to go out on circuit.
Taken with Praktica PM-3.

Categories.value: Port Hercule|Files from external sources with reviewed licenses|Images by SkySat satellites|Satellite pictures of Monaco|Images with extracted images|Monaco photographs taken on 2018-04-01|2018 aerial photographs of Monaco

ImageDescription.value: Circuit de Monaco is a street circuit laid out on the city streets of Monte Carlo and La Condamine around the harbour of the principality of Monaco. It is home to the Formula One Monaco Grand Prix, Formula E Monaco ePrix, and the Historic Grand Prix of Monaco. Image taken on April 1, 2018, by a Planet Labs SkySat satellite.

ImageDescription.value: The Circuit de Monaco is a race course on the streets of Monaco, used for a variety of motorsports over the years. Between 1955 and 1962, this iteration of the course was used, with the start/finish line on the harbour front. In 1963, the start/finish line was moved to the straight approaching Sainte Dévote.

Credit.value:
Own work

  • Some derivation from File:Monte Carlo Formula 1 track map.svg, created by Will Pittenger
  • Start/finish line and pits location based on race reports and the map provided at 1955 Monaco Grand Prix, Motor Sport Magazine

146869127.title: File:USS Fiske (DDR-842) entering Monte Carlo harbour, Monaco, in 1957 (NH 102962).jpg

ObjectName.value: USS Fiske (DDR-842) entering Monte Carlo harbour, Monaco, in 1957 (NH 102962)

Categories.value: Files with no machine-readable author|Monaco in the 1950s|USS Fiske (DD-842)|PD US Navy|CC-PD-Mark|Images from the Naval History and Heritage Command

ImageDescription.value: The U.S. Navy radar picket destroyer USS Fiske (DDR-842) entering Monte Carlo harbour, Monaco, in 1957. Note crewmen in Whites, the anchor detail, and the crew at quarters for entering port. Fiske now carries a TACAN URN-7 antenna admidships.

Credit.value: U.S. Navy photo NH 102962
